prerequisites: A NewsData.io API key, available from the API key section of your NewsData.io dashboard. The free plan provides a limited daily request quota; paid plans raise the limits.
A start_date for the sync window in YYYY-MM-DD format (this field is required).

authMethods.name: API key
authMethods.summary: NewsData.io authenticates every request with an API key. Supply it in the connector's api_key secret field. The API passes this value as the apikey query parameter, which is required on all requests.

setupSteps.title: Create a NewsData.io account
setupSteps.body: Sign up at https://newsdata.io/register (or log in if you already have an account). Registration is required to use the API, and a free plan with a daily request quota is available.

setupSteps.title: Get your API key
setupSteps.body: Open your NewsData.io dashboard from the account menu in the top right corner and go to the API key section. Copy your personal API key. Treat it as a secret and do not share it; it can be regenerated if compromised.

setupSteps.title: Provide the API key to the connector
setupSteps.body: Paste the copied key into the api_key field. This is the only required credential; the connector sends it to NewsData.io as the apikey parameter to authenticate requests.

setupSteps.title: Set the start date and optional filters
setupSteps.body: Set start_date (required) in YYYY-MM-DD format to mark the beginning of the news window, and optionally set end_date for the upper bound. Refine results with the optional filters: search_query (keyword search), categories, countries, languages, and domains. Leave any optional field blank to omit that filter.

sources.title: How to Get Your NewsData.io News API Key
